title: knowledge-article-taxonomy-agent inputs
description: Typed inputs for the knowledge-article-taxonomy-agent runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: `prod` Required column: 'yes for audit'.

audiences.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["internal agent","customer","partner","public web"]` Required column: 'yes for design'.

languages.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["en_US","es","fr","ja"]` Required column: 'yes for design'.

article_types.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["How-To","Troubleshooting","Policy","Release Note"]` Required column: 'no'.

search_surface.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["agent console","experience cloud","einstein-search","ai-overviews"]` Required column: 'no'.
